CurriculumSection.title: Learning Curriculum
CurriculumSection.subtitle: A structured path from fundamentals to production practice

linux.title: Linux Commands
linux.description: Learn the fundamentals of shell usage, file systems, and process management

networking.title: Networking
networking.description: Understand the principles behind TCP/IP, DNS, and routing

os.title: Operating Systems
os.description: Study Linux kernel concepts and core system administration

hardware.title: Hardware Infrastructure
hardware.description: Understand the physical foundations of servers, storage, and data centers

aws.title: AWS Cloud
aws.description: Practice AWS core services such as EC2, S3, and VPC

containers.title: Containers
containers.description: Learn container orchestration with Docker and Kubernetes

iac.title: IaC
iac.description: Manage infrastructure with Infrastructure as Code practices

security.title: Security Basics
security.description: Learn the basics of firewalls, encryption, and access control

monitoring.title: Monitoring & Logging
monitoring.description: Monitor system health and analyze logs

projects.title: Production Projects
projects.description: Apply what you learned by building and operating real services
